option.DisplayText: {{g|U}}{{G|D}} {{c|Modding}} {{Y|Tool}}{{C|box}}: Turn on debug logging for this mod.
option.helptext:
When enabled, the mod will output verbose logs to Player.log tracing program flow specifically within the mod.
The default is {{w|Disabled}}.

option.DisplayText: {{g|U}}{{G|D}} {{c|Modding}} {{Y|Tool}}{{C|box}}: Show General Stuff internal debug information in relevant ShortDescriptions displayed in the [{{W|l}}]ook UI.
option.helptext:
When enabled, internal debug information relating to General Stuff will be displayed when [{{W|l}}]ooking at anything with the relevant part.
{{M|General Stuff}}: {{W|General}}: General stuff. {{W|Mechanics}}: Information specific to the function of General Stuff. {{W|State}}: Current internal flags used to determine different actions happening.
The default is {{w|Disabled}}.
